accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context, including the Semiquincentennial Commission Act of 2016 and the 2019 Apollo 11 projection.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; contextual details about the Commission and prior commemorations are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution requests the Secretary of the Interior to authorize one-time displays to begin the 250th anniversary celebrations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The resolution makes no changes to existing law, and the summary correctly notes it does not amend law.

exceptions_conditions.why: The summary captures the material limits: unique/one-time arrangements, five nights, and the specified period.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the display period of December 31, 2025 through January 5, 2026 and the July 4, 2026 anniversary.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both operative requests: authorizing the displays and transmitting the enrolled copy to the named officials.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

correct_entities.why: Secretary of the Interior, Clerk of the House, the Commission, and its Chair are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The dates, five-night duration, and the 250th anniversary figure are all stated correctly.
